A

addTask(Task) - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.TaskMonitor
Add the task to the monitor.

C

close() - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.TaskMonitor
Stop the monitoring thread.
com.amonson.task_manager - package com.amonson.task_manager
 

D

Default - com.amonson.task_manager.Task.Type
 

E

execute(Class<?>, String[], Task.Type, Object) - Static method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Execute the task either on a Thread or Process.

G

getException() - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Get a exception if the Thread.start() or ProcessBuilder.start() threw an exception.
getException(long) - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Get a exception if the Thread.start() or ProcessBuilder.start() threw an exception.
getResult() - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Get the return code from the application task.
getResult(long) - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Get the return code from the application task.
getUserData() - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Retrieve the user data supplied in execute().

I

isRunning() - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Test if the Task is running.

P

Process - com.amonson.task_manager.Task.Type
 

S

stopRunning() - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Stops the Task.

T

Task - Class in com.amonson.task_manager
A Task that can be run as a process or as an isolated thread.
Task.Type - Enum in com.amonson.task_manager
Possible types of task execution (Process=Default or Thread).
taskEnded(Task) - Method in interface com.amonson.task_manager.TaskMonitor.Callback
 
TaskMonitor - Class in com.amonson.task_manager
A monitor to "watch" Tasks for completion.
TaskMonitor(TaskMonitor.Callback) - Constructor for class com.amonson.task_manager.TaskMonitor
Constructs a TaskMonitor with a specific callback which will be called on Task completion.
TaskMonitor.Callback - Interface in com.amonson.task_manager
Functional interface for a completion callback for a task.
Thread - com.amonson.task_manager.Task.Type
 

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum com.amonson.task_manager.Task.Type
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum com.amonson.task_manager.Task.Type
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

W

waitForCompletion() - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Block until the Task stops.
waitForCompletion(long) - Method in class com.amonson.task_manager.Task
Block until stopped or a timeout expires.
